{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10426523?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/PJUllrich", "id": 10426523, "login": "PJUllrich", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEwNDI2NTIz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32688", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Summary

An unauthenticated remote denial-of-service vulnerability in `Plug.Cowboy.Conn` allows any attacker who can reach an HTTPS Plug.Cowboy listener via HTTP/2 to permanently exhaust the BEAM atom table and crash the entire Erlang VM.

## Am I Affected?

All users running plug_cowboy with HTTP/2 may be affected, this includes Phoenix applications. If another HTTP adapter such as Bandit is used, then the consuming project is not affected. If the HTTP/2 endpoint is exposed directly (without a proxy) then the project will be affected. If a proxy is in use then it depends on the proxy configuration. Many proxies use HTTP/1.1 internally, and would be unaffected.

## Impact

The vulnerability will allow crashing the Erlang VM (BEAM) via atom exhaustion.

## Mitigation

Users are advised to update to plug_cowboy v2.8.1 to mitigate this issue.

## Credits
Plug.Cowboy thanks Peter Ullrich for finding and responsibly disclosing this vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00545, "percentile": 0.41547}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T21:46:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32688"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-27T14:16:47Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:46:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/elixir-plug/plug_cowboy/security/advisories/GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32688", "https://github.com/elixir-plug/plug_cowboy/commit/bfb34cb45eb354e56437f7023fb306de1bf9c19b", "https://cna.erlef.org/cves/CVE-2026-32688.html", "https://osv.dev/vulnerability/EEF-CVE-2026-32688", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/elixir-plug/plug_cowboy/security-advisories/GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/elixir-plug/plug_cowboy", "summary": "Plug.Cowboy vulnerable to unauthenticated remote DoS via HTTP/2 `:scheme` atom-table exhaustion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T21:46:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q8x4-x7mp-5vg2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "erlang", "name": "plug_cowboy"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 2.8.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Plug.Cowboy vulnerable to unauthenticated remote DoS via HTTP/2 `:scheme` atom-table exhaustion
